title: C2 grasp-retention resolution
safe_claim: Terminal negative: the loop localized fixed-pad placement and actuator overclosure, but no rigid contact candidate jointly reproduced physical loaded aperture, transport, slip, and retention through release.
diagnosis: Fixed-side rubber was not aligned with the rigid jaw surface carrying the C2 pawn.
The plain position actuator overcloses instead of holding the retained loaded joint position.
Rigid box and capsule pads cannot reproduce the real cap's force-dependent deformation and distributed patch.
required_measurement: Direct jaw force plus rubber-cap profile and deformation under synchronized high-rate angle/current capture.
